prompts: Black and white editorial portrait of Ray Dalio, smiling, seated in a modern chair, looking slightly off-camera right, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, professional and approachable mood.

Split image: left side - black and white portrait of a distinguished businessman; right side - minimalist dark mode AI chat interface with 'Welcome, God' as a prominent greeting, an input field with 'How can I help you today?' placeholder, and 'Sonnet 4.6 Extended' model selection.
generation_parameters.technical_settings: Photography: Studio lighting setup, large aperture (f/2.8-f/4), medium telephoto lens (85mm-135mm), low ISO, black and white conversion. UI: Digital render, dark mode theme, sans-serif fonts, minimalist design.
generation_parameters.post_processing: Black and white conversion, subtle contrast enhancement, gentle sharpening for the portrait. Clean digital rendering for the UI.

body_text: How can I help you today?
